div.style: padding: 16px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;

button.style: background-color: #4361ee; border: none; padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 6px; color: #fff;

th.style: padding: 12px 20px; font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; text-transform: uppercase; text-align: right;

tr.td: No price book entries yet. Click "Add Entry" to create one.

div.style: padding: 16px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;

button.style: background-color: #4361ee; border: none; padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 6px; color: #fff;

th.style: padding: 12px 20px; font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; text-transform: uppercase; text-align: right;

button.style: background-color: #4361ee; border: none; padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 6px; color: #fff;
background-color: #4361ee; border: none; padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 6px; color: #fff;

div.t: Use the sidebar to select an employee.

t.div: No store performance data for this period.

div.div: Choose an employee to view today's visit plan.
Orders linked to visits will appear here.
No records found for this period.

span.t-att-style: rec.criteria_id and rec.criteria_id[1] === 'Revenue' ? 'background:#dbeafe;color:#1e40af;' : rec.criteria_id and rec.criteria_id[1] === 'Collection' ? 'background:#dcfce7;color:#166534;' : rec.criteria_id and rec.criteria_id[1] === 'New Outlets' ? 'background:#fef9c3;color:#854d0e;' : rec.criteria_id and rec.criteria_id[1] === 'Productive Calls' ? 'background:#ede9fe;color:#5b21b6;' : 'background:#f3f4f6;color:#374151;'

rec.status==='approved' ? 'background:#dcfce7;color:#166534;border:1px solid #bbf7d0;' : rec.status==='paid' ? 'background:#ede9fe;color:#5b21b6;border:1px solid #ddd6fe;' : rec.status==='rejected' ? 'background:#fee2e2;color:#991b1b;border:1px solid #fecaca;' : rec.status==='pending_approval' ? 'background:#dbeafe;color:#1e40af;border:1px solid #bfdbfe;' : 'background:#fff7ed;color:#c2410c;border:1px solid #fed7aa;'

div.div: No slabs match the selected filters.
